# 

What is Clever?

[](#what-is-clever)

Clever provides **rostering** via **Clever Secure Sync** and **SSO** via **Clever Single Sign-On** services for numerous educational applications, serving over **70% of schools in the USA**. Our platform saves teachers and students time by streamlining account management, enabling them to focus on learning. Clever integrates seamlessly with any **Student Information System (SIS)** through direct integrations or **SFTP automations**.

Our newest offerings include **Clever LMS Connect,** which leverages your application’s existing integrations with Clever APIs and extends your capabilities in supporting LMS writeback, and **AnySchool** rostering, which extends Clever Secure Sync for use with schools that aren’t on Clever, using Clever as data subprocessor.

For developers, Clever’s **APIs** allow integration into nearly any school district without requiring additional development or integration work.

> ## 📘
> 
> **New to Clever?**
> 
> Learn about Clever’s benefits for app partners and school districts by enrolling in our free training course: [Clever Academy for App Partners](https://clever.academy/ca-app-partners).

* * *

# 

What is Clever Complete?

[](#what-is-clever-complete)

> ## 📘
> 
> What is Clever Complete?
> 
> Clever Complete is the platform solution purpose-built for EdTech scalability—connecting our application partners to any school through a single, secure integration for rostering, SSO, and LMS connections.

Clever offers the following products with a **Clever Complete subscription**:

-   [Clever Secure Sync](/docs/secure-sync-rostering)
-   [Clever Single Sign-On](/docs/district-sso-1)
-   [Clever LMS Connect](/docs/clever-lms-connect)
-   [AnySchool Rostering](/docs/anyschool-rostering)
-   [SAML Integrations](/docs/saml)

You can read more about each of these integrations here: [Clever Complete Integration Types](/docs/integration-types)

* * *

# 

Clever Library

[](#clever-library)

If you'd like to test out Clever without a subscription, we recommend starting with a **Clever Library integration**. You can read more about creating a developer account and Clever Library integrations below:

[Getting Started with Clever](/docs/getting-started)  
[Clever Library - Overview](/docs/library-sso)
